texto: In your life never become an agent of Negativity
autor: Unknowingly if you act negative to positive pursuits... you unnecessarily accumulate Karmic bondage... Then why act negative ?
explicacao: Citação de Unknowingly if you act negative to positive pursuits... you unnecessarily accumulate Karmic bondage... Then why act negative ? sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “In your life never become an agent of Negativity” articula reflexao, dinesh-kumar, never em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
